arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola responds to war of words with Jose Mourinho
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has responded to Jose Mourinho's jibe about Man City's Premier League charges.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola explains key Man City decisions as duo dropped
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has explained why he dropped Jack Grealish and Jeremy Doku from the Man City starting lineup to face Crystal Palace on Saturday. The Premier League champions got their campaign back on track with a 3-0 victory over Nottingham Forest on Wednesday, the first win in eight matches in all competitions. With table-topping Liverpool’s […] The post Pep Guardiola explains key Man City decisions as duo dropped first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Why Jack Grealish and Jeremy Doku were dropped for Man City vs Crystal Palace amid cryptic Guardiola update
arts.sum: Manchester City faced Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park without seven players - and Jack Grealish could be another injury concern.

arts.sum: Palace are in action against Manchester City at Selhurst Park this afternoon - check out the best shots in the gallery below!

arts.ttl: Four Manchester City Players to Miss Crystal Palace Due to Injury
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has been left without four key players for the team's trip to Selhurst Park this afternoon to play Crystal Palace in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Man City look to resurrect title campaign at Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola makes four changes to his starting XI for the visit to Crystal Palace - follow live on ESPN

arts.ttl: Analysis: Why De Bruyne can reignite Man City's title defence
arts.sum: For their opening goal, De Bruyne (circled in red) deliberately held back his run at the far post, identifying that Forest’s retreating defenders all had their eyes fixed on the ball, rather than his position in space. Despite it being only his fifth top-flight start of the campaign, De Bruyne recorded more than four shots and created more than four chances for the third time this season.

arts.ttl: Why Manuel Akanji is missing for Man City vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Manchester City have travelled down to Crystal Palace for a Premier League match without three of their centre-backs

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace v Manchester City, Brentford v Newcastle, and more: football – live
arts.sum: Follow updates from Saturday afternoon’s football action Live scoreboard | Everton v Liverpool off | And email John Paul MacInnes on an important topic – how clubs are squeezing the pips of fans. It is time for unity. Jeremy Boyce gets in touch: “Looking forward to your MostlyPremierLeagueClockwatch. There could be plenty of slapstick, given the weather conditions, and possibly a custard pie in the face for are they/aren’t they ? Citeh at Selhurst Park, one of the most difficult grounds to get to I can remember from my days following Shrewsbury Town round the 2nd and 3rd division in London back in the day (Griffin Park (RIP), Brisbane Road (RIP), The Old Den (RIP) etc.... Thanks for the update on my other team, NotAsNastyAsTheyUsedToBeLeeds.” Continue reading...

arts.sum: The expanded version of the competition takes place in the United States next summer with Chelsea and Man City representing the Premier League
